note: Stage-1 CLOSED (search converged in rounds 1-3): lr=3e-4, r=32/alpha=64, attn-only, epochs=3, train_interval=2 (round3: ti=1 has NO consistent gain on audio/image and costs 1.2-1.6x; ljspeech even prefers ti=2). This round is NOT a search — it is the one untested METHOD axis the paper needs: train_on_recent-interval (false) vs train_on_all-seen (true). Scale is deliberately reduced (audio_clips 128->16) because train_on_all retrains on the whole growing history each interval (O(n^2)); the ablation is a same-scale relative comparison so the smaller baseline is fine. If true wins by a real margin, it becomes a compute/ratio Pareto point; if not, recent-only is confirmed as the efficient default.
